data.title: Integrate Gate 1b into fix-bug SKILL.md
data.description:
Add Gate 1b (feature-request language check) to fix-bug SKILL.md.

The section:
- Runs ONLY when Gate 1a returned ambiguous (skip for intent-aligned/contradicting)
- Passes ticket title and description as JSON to script via stdin
- If triggered:true -> primary signal (potential feature request)
- If triggered:false -> no signal, proceed to investigation
- Error handling: script failure -> triggered:false, construct full 5-field gate signal
- Position: pre-investigation, after Gate 1a, before investigation dispatch
- Structural tests (Task 3) serve as validation method per Critical Rule 20

TDD: GREEN — implement until Task 3 tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All RED tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_1b.py -q
- [ ] SKILL.md contains Gate 1b section
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate 1b' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] References feature-request check script
  Verify: grep -q 'gate-1b-feature-request-check' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Documents conditional on Gate 1a ambiguous
  Verify: grep -q 'ambiguous' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
